title: Sidotheca caryophylloides
intro: Sidotheca caryophylloides, also known as Chilean guayapé or Chilean guayape, is a plant species belonging to the family Muntingiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in South America, to treat various health conditions, including gastrointestinal issues and inflammation, due to its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The bioactive constituents of Sidotheca caryophylloides include flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids, which are believed to contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Sidotheca caryophylloides is often prepared as a decoction or infused as a tea, and is also used to make capsules or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
